farmerDashboard.title: Kisan Krishi Seva
farmerDashboard.welcome: Welcome back, Rajesh. Your crop health is looking stable across 14 hectares. We have detected new market opportunities for your Wheat harvest.
farmerDashboard.activityApprovedDesc: Your insurance claim for Wheat field frost damage has been approved for Rs 45,000.
farmerDashboard.activityMessageDesc: Officer Shinde requested additional photos of the irrigation setup for verification.
farmerDashboard.activityWeatherDesc: Extreme heat warning issued for next 48 hours. AI Advisor recommends early irrigation.
farmerDashboard.aiSuggestionDesc: Farmers in your region using bio-organic spray saw a 12% increase in Wheat yield last season.

farmerClaims.title: My Claims
farmerClaims.subtitle: Track and manage your agricultural insurance claims and payouts.

chatbot.title: AI Advisor
chatbot.subtitle: Your digital agronomist for smarter farming decisions
chatbot.welcome: Namaste! Ask me about crop claims, scheme deadlines, or weather risks in your district.
chatbot.prompt1: What is the PM Fasal Bima claim deadline?
chatbot.prompt2: How to file a crop damage claim?
chatbot.prompt3: What documents are required for claim approval?
chatbot.prompt4: How does district weather risk affect claims?
chatbot.prompt5: How can I check PM-Kisan payment status?
chatbot.prompt6: What to do if my Aadhaar is not linked with claim profile?
chatbot.answer1: For PM Fasal Bima, file within 72 hours of damage and submit crop photos, location details, and incident date.
chatbot.answer2: Go to New Claim, select crop and damage type, upload evidence photos, and submit your incident details.
chatbot.answer3: You usually need ID proof, land details, sowing date, incident date, and clear field photos for verification.
chatbot.answer4: High rainfall and flood alerts can raise risk score, which helps officers prioritize field verification faster.
chatbot.answer5: Use your registered mobile number on the PM-Kisan portal and check installment status under beneficiary details.
chatbot.answer6: Visit your nearest CSC or update Aadhaar linkage in your farmer profile before submitting a fresh claim.
chatbot.inputPlaceholder: Ask about claims, schemes, crop support, or weather...
chatbot.trustText: Recommendations are based on local regional data and validated agronomical science. Always consult local experts for large-scale operations.
chatbot.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach AI service. Please try again.
chatbot.tempUnavailable: I am temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
chatbot.noResponse: I could not generate a response right now.

newClaim.title: Report Crop Damage
newClaim.subtitle: Please provide accurate details of the incident to expedite your insurance processing.
newClaim.incidentLogisticsDesc: When and where did it happen?
newClaim.damageDescriptionDesc: Provide qualitative details for the adjuster
newClaim.narrativePlaceholder: Describe the progression of damage and current state of the crop...
newClaim.visualEvidenceDesc: High-resolution photos help speed up claims
newClaim.dropFiles: Drop files here or click to browse
newClaim.fileSupport: Support JPG, PNG up to 15MB per file
newClaim.securityNote: Your data is protected by Grade-A encryption and will only be shared with certified adjusters.
newClaim.submitError: Could not submit claim. Please retry.
newClaim.emptyDraftError: Add at least one field before saving a draft.
newClaim.draftError: Could not save draft. Please retry.

grievancesPage.title: Grievance Support
grievancesPage.subtitle: Submit your concerns directly to our agronomy specialists. We track every issue from field to resolution.
grievancesPage.submitSuccess: Grievance submitted successfully. Our team will contact you soon.
grievancesPage.submitError: Unable to submit grievance right now. Please try again.
grievancesPage.immediateAdviceDesc: Our AI Advisor can analyze crop symptoms while your grievance is being processed.
grievancesPage.delayedDisbursementDesc: Submitted on Oct 12, 2023. Claim #INS-882 is still showing as 'Pending Verification' after 14 business days.
grievancesPage.officerAssignedTime: Today, 09:45 AM • Field Officer Rahul S.
grievancesPage.pestTitle: Pest Infestation in Wheat Sector B
grievancesPage.pestDesc: Submitted on Sep 28, 2023. Request for emergency fungicide recommendation.
grievancesPage.resolutionQuote: "Site visit conducted on Oct 1. Applied Tilt (Propiconazole 25% EC). Crop recovery observed at 85% efficacy."
grievancesPage.validationDescription: Please describe the issue in at least 20 characters.
